column3:
Look in ~/reading_rows/table2 with ls -a 
 You will find .hidden_envelope there
Read it with
	cat ~/reading_rows/table2/.hidden_envelope

Systems store invisible information in their environment
Variables that exist but are not shown until requested
The env command lists all environment variables
	Look for one named LEVEL_1_KEY

Complete operating procedure:
1. Make sure you are NOT in the control_room
2. Go to observation_deck/platform
3. Run: panel script with Absolute Path
3. The script will detect you are outside and reveal the key
